evidence: The inherited W4d ledger closed with dual NO_BLOCKER after round 10 on 5abdad5a. W4f then added the rating-blind WOD path-type freeze bytes and rebuilt the candidate manifest from 93 to 101 rows.

W4f round 1 on 9cc3a788 produced statistics blockers S1-S3. Round 2 remediation 81c684a3 closed the K/F taxonomy and protected-v2 findings but retained the exact-boundary fixture residual; round 3 d1dc2a30 made the 45-degree comparator operand bit-exact, added both side companions, and hardened every other threshold assertion.

The round-3 confirmation returned statistics NO_BLOCKER and execution first-look NO_BLOCKER on the exact 101-row manifest SHA-256 420699d21efa7123dbccf9c75d7401c83c1ef50368f171d350c61aa5264dff6b, with distinct reviewer identities and zero unresolved blockers or majors.
findings.summary: The W4f remediation ledger and terminal dual review close the path-type package for Formal-G1 assembly.

evidence: The execution contract retains the fixed-root rating-blind mapping manifest schema and promotes exactly three WOD mapping hashes through the v1p6 registry, bringing the active materialization binding count to 12 without modifying the protected v2 envelope-builder bytes.

Structural no-geometry scenes terminate at K before lookup; only geometry-available absent lookup rows terminate at F. Missing, malformed, drifted or non-unique mapping bytes remain fail closed with no runtime classification or fallback.
The mapped CSV and manifest remain byte-identical at SHA-256 6e689647a6d8b22cbb8e35c7b9c0889c022798b76a34bec02da2ccb706175078 and 8c48d0eb2f8c530bc0e885b2115136fcf66f69b6f62563de88f31287255040d8.
findings.summary: The registry, materialization and fixed-root mapping controls remain exact and fail closed.

evidence: Current managed pins are launcher SHA-256 89e87fcb721e6c785803e414526ce3b751a2ccc87e3b026b02f8e23e7043f3fe at 122,879 bytes, preflight SHA-256 dce18f8c7f1fbf8f8dee2d4c5b726260a9acba988b5181e4948b991c748af794 at 79,627 bytes, and wrapper SHA-256 a504e4f1593575ca28251fe1b1d4ac7d959ea9257d0c2e4984a30ba42020106e at 8,108 bytes; wrapper, README and execution-contract pins agree.
The terminal candidate manifest is sorted, unique, deterministic at 101 rows and binds the exact execution, science, schema, decision, authority and test bytes under adjudication.
No launcher invocation, HPC operation, rating access or Slurm submission occurred during execution-governance review.
findings.summary: The reviewed pin chain, manifest closure and no-execution boundary are intact.
